channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inside House Democrats' fear-driven turn against Israel
item.description: Last week's showdown over U.S. aid to Israel reveals how progressive anger is reshaping Democratic policy.

item.title: The secret Trump administration battle to fight Chinese AI
item.description: The Trump administration is considering banning advanced Chinese AI models, a move that could solidify dominance by OpenAI and others.

item.title: U.S. strikes Iran again after troop deaths
item.description: The U.S. military launched fresh strikes against Iran on Sunday, following the death of one American service member and the recovery of others.

item.title: Gas again tops $4 per gallon as Iran fighting persists
item.description: Drivers face rising prices as the national average gas price climbs above $4 per gallon, with President Trump expected to escalate actions.
